playbook.intent: New frontier or open-weight model dropped → decide within a day whether it enters cascade, replaces a tier, or is shelved.
playbook.scope: A new frontier or open-weight model dropped. Decide within a day whether it enters the cascade, replaces a tier, or is shelved. Goal: ship the decision same day with cost+quality table.

success-criteria.criterion: Decision: enter cascade / replace tier / shelve

stage.name: Onboard
stage.intent: Wire the model behind adapter; pin schema.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when adapter calls succeed.

stage.name: Bench
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when both sets ran end-to-end.

stage.name: Decide
stage.decision-gate: Ship only when decision is one of: cascade / replace / shelve.

extra.value: [Re-architecting the agent — out of scope, Long-term capability research]
[Eval harness with golden + adversarial sets, Gateway adapter for the new model]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content bench-against-new-sota-model --format md, agent: faion get-content bench-against-new-sota-model --format context, json: faion get-content bench-against-new-sota-model --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
